_instructions: This file stores manually verified PSS/E outputs used as golden reference values.
Option A (recommended): run  python tests/extract_golden.py  — it fills this file automatically.
Option B (manual): open each study in PSS/E, run it once, record the values below.
After populating, verify the values match your manual PSS/E output before committing.
voltage: ±0.005 pu  |  fault current: ±0.05 kA  |  rotor angle: ±2 deg
PV collapse: ±5 MW  |  energy balance mismatch: <0.5 %

power_flow._comment: Record POI and source bus voltages from a manual power flow solve on the .sav

key_buses._comment: Add one entry per important bus (POI neighbours, source, slack, etc.)

short_circuit._comment: Record 3PH and LG fault currents (kA) from a manual SC run at each substation bus

buses._comment: Repeat this block for each substation / study bus

transient_stability._comment: Record AESO pass/fail, peak rotor angle, and min POI voltage for each contingency

contingencies._comment: Repeat for every contingency in your TS_Contingencies sheet

pv_stability._comment: Record PV curve collapse points and minimum voltages from a manual PV run

n1_contingencies._comment: Repeat for each N-1 contingency in your PV_Contingencies sheet
